Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide: Expert\&#8217;s Top Picks

By fitnest33 • 4/3/2024
best-of

Did you know that pickleball is one of the fastest-growing sports in America? According to recent statistics, over 3 million people actively play pickleball in the United States alone. With such a massive following, finding the right gear for this popular sport can be overwhelming. That\’s why we\’ve compiled the Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide: Expert\’s Top Picks for the year. Our team of pickleball enthusiasts and experts has tested and evaluated various equipment options to bring you the top-rated gear and must-have essentials to elevate your game.

From balls to paddles to accessories, this comprehensive guide will help you make informed decisions and find the perfect gear that suits your playing style and skill level. Whether you\’re a beginner or a competitive player, we\’ve got you covered. So let\’s dive in and discover the best pickleball gear of the year!

Key Takeaways:

  • Discover expert picks for the best pickleball gear of the year.
  • Learn about top-rated balls, paddles, and accessories.
  • Find the gear that suits your playing style and skill level.
  • Elevate your pickleball game with the right equipment.
  • Enhance your overall pickleball experience by investing in quality gear.

Best Pickleball Balls

When it comes to pickleball, having the right ball can make all the difference in the game. Whether you\’re a beginner or a competitive player, choosing the best pickleball ball for your needs is essential. We\’ve curated a list of top picks that cater to various playing styles and skill levels. From overall performance to durability and value, these balls are sure to enhance your pickleball experience.

Best Pickleball Ball Overall: Franklin Sports X-40 Pickleballs

The Franklin Sports X-40 Pickleballs are the top choice for many players. With their long-lasting build, easy spin, and wide array of color options, these balls provide excellent performance on any court. Whether you\’re a seasoned player or a beginner, the Franklin Sports X-40 Pickleballs deliver consistent playability.

Best Ball for Beginners: Wilson Tru 32 Ball – 2 Pack

If you\’re just starting out, the Wilson Tru 32 Ball – 2 Pack is perfect for you. With its unique injection molded design, good price point, and easy ball tracking, it\’s an ideal choice for beginners. Get ready to improve your skills and enjoy the game with these beginner-friendly pickleball balls.

Best Ball for Competitive Play: Onix Dura Fast 40 Pickleballs

For competitive players who are looking for superior performance, the Onix Dura Fast 40 Pickleballs are the way to go. These balls are highly responsive to spin shots and move faster, making them the ideal choice for competitive play. With the Onix Dura Fast 40 Pickleballs, you\’ll take your game to the next level.

Best New Ball: PCKL Optic Speed Pickleballs Outdoor 4 Pack

Are you in search of the latest and greatest pickleball ball? Look no further than the PCKL Optic Speed Pickleballs Outdoor 4 Pack. These balls offer high-quality build, good bounce, and are built to USAPA specs for competitive play. Stay ahead of the game with these top-of-the-line pickleball balls.

Best Ball for Indoor Use: Jugs Sport Pickleballs, 12-Pack

When it comes to indoor play, the Jugs Sport Pickleballs, 12-Pack is a standout choice. Designed specifically for indoor use, these balls offer easy tracking in low light, excellent bounce, and a solid price point. With the Jugs Sport Pickleballs, you\’ll enjoy optimal performance in any indoor pickleball match.

Most Durable Ball: Onix Fuse G2 Pickleball Ball, 6-Pack

If durability is a top priority for you, the Onix Fuse G2 Pickleball Ball, 6-Pack is a must-have. Known for its high level of durability, these balls can withstand intense gameplay and perform well even in windy conditions. Play with confidence, knowing that the Onix Fuse G2 Pickleball Ball won\’t let you down.

Best Balls to Buy in Bulk: Wilson TRU 32 Ball – Case

For those looking to stock up on pickleball balls, the Wilson TRU 32 Ball – Case is your best bet. This cost-effective option allows you to buy pickleball balls in bulk, making it suitable for beginners, teaching purposes, or frequent players. With the Wilson TRU 32 Ball – Case, you\’ll always have enough balls for your pickleball sessions.

Most Underrated Ball: Wilson Tru 32 Pro Ball – 2 Pack

Often overlooked but highly impressive, the Wilson Tru 32 Pro Ball – 2 Pack is worth a closer look. This ball is the perfect choice for intermediate to competitive play, offering faster ball speed and an excellent price point. Don\’t underestimate the Wilson Tru 32 Pro Ball – 2 Pack for its size, as it delivers exceptional performance on the court.

Another Great Ball for Indoor Play: Onix Pure 3 Indoor Pickleball Balls

Looking for another reliable option for indoor play? The Onix Pure 3 Indoor Pickleball Balls are designed to provide a long lifespan, a high level of bounce, and are made with USAPA specs for indoor play. With these pickleball balls, you can expect consistent performance and durability in all your indoor matches.

Best Hybrid Ball: Selkirk Sport SLK Hybrid Indoor & Outdoor Pickleball Ball

The Selkirk Sport SLK Hybrid Indoor & Outdoor Pickleball Ball is the ultimate versatile option. With a 100% matte finish, this ball can be played on both indoor and outdoor surfaces. Whether you\’re playing on a gym court or an outdoor pickleball venue, the Selkirk Sport SLK Hybrid Indoor & Outdoor Pickleball Ball is your perfect companion.

Ball Key Features
Franklin Sports X-40 Pickleballs Long-lasting build, easy spin, wide array of color options
Wilson Tru 32 Ball – 2 Pack Unique injection molded design, good price point, easy ball tracking
Onix Dura Fast 40 Pickleballs Highly responsive to spin shots, faster movement for competitive play
PCKL Optic Speed Pickleballs Outdoor 4 Pack High-quality build, good bounce, built to USAPA specs
Jugs Sport Pickleballs, 12-Pack Designed for indoor play, easy tracking in low light, excellent bounce
Onix Fuse G2 Pickleball Ball, 6-Pack High level of durability, performs well in windy conditions
Wilson TRU 32 Ball – Case Cost-effective bulk option, suitable for beginners and teaching purposes
Wilson Tru 32 Pro Ball – 2 Pack Great choice for intermediate to competitive play, faster ball speed
Onix Pure 3 Indoor Pickleball Balls Long lifespan, high level of bounce, made with USAPA specs for indoor play
Selkirk Sport SLK Hybrid Indoor & Outdoor Pickleball Ball 100% matte finish, can be played on both indoor and outdoor surfaces

Best Pickleball Paddles

In an exciting game of pickleball, having the right paddle can make all the difference in your performance. We\’ve curated a list of the best pickleball paddles that excel in various aspects to suit different playing styles and preferences.

Best Overall Pickleball Paddle: Head Radical Tour RAW

The Head Radical Tour RAW paddle is a top choice for pickleball players seeking a versatile paddle that combines power, precision, and a balanced flight pattern. Its 15-mm Polypropylene Core provides excellent responsiveness, while the Raw Carbon Fiber surface offers optimal performance and durability.

Best Value Pickleball Paddle: Ektelon Inferno Paddles

For players looking for exceptional performance at a great price point, the Ektelon Inferno Paddles are an excellent pick. These paddles offer solid performance, consistent bounce, and are popular among players of all skill levels.

Best Control Pickleball Paddle: Selkirk LUXX Control Air Invikta

The Selkirk LUXX Control Air Invikta paddle is a favorite among players who value control and precision. With its 20-mm Thikset Honeycomb Core and ProSpin+NextGen Textured surface, this paddle provides exceptional control for precise shots and all-court versatility.

Best Feel Pickleball Paddle: JOOLA Ben Johns Hyperion C2 16

When it comes to having an exceptional feel and touch on the paddle, the JOOLA Ben Johns Hyperion C2 16 is a top choice. Designed with a Reactive Polymer Honeycomb Core, this paddle delivers a comfortable response at ball contact and combines the best qualities from previous paddle models.

Best Power Pickleball Paddle: Selkirk Power Air Invikta

For players who prefer a paddle with power potential, the Selkirk Power Air Invikta is an excellent option. Its widened paddle face, edgeless design, and thinner 13-mm Polymer Core deliver optimal power and easy shot depth, making it a popular choice among competitive players.

Best Spin Pickleball Paddle: CRBN 3X Power Series 14

If you\’re looking to generate exceptional spin on your shots, the CRBN 3X Power Series 14 is a paddle worth considering. With its Thermo-Formed construction and Raw T700 Carbon Fiber surface, this paddle provides predictable power and a comfortable response, enhancing your spin potential.

Paddle Core Material Surface Material Key Features
Head Radical Tour RAW 15-mm Polypropylene Core Raw Carbon Fiber Power, precision, balanced flight pattern
Ektelon Inferno Paddles N/A N/A Great value, solid performance, consistent bounce
Selkirk LUXX Control Air Invikta 20-mm Thikset Honeycomb Core ProSpin+NextGen Textured Surface Excellent control, all-court versatility, comfort
JOOLA Ben Johns Hyperion C2 16 Reactive Polymer Honeycomb Core Comfortable response, exceptional feel Touch, precise shots
Selkirk Power Air Invikta 13-mm Polymer Core Widened paddle face, edgeless design Optimal power, easy shot depth
CRBN 3X Power Series 14 Thermo-Formed Raw T700 Carbon Fiber Exceptional spin potential, predictable power

Must-Have Pickleball Accessories

When it comes to pickleball, having the right accessories can greatly enhance your game and overall playing experience. From essential equipment like pickleballs to convenient gear for storage and protection, here are some must-have pickleball accessories to consider:

Pickleballs

One of the most important accessories for pickleball is, of course, the pickleballs themselves. Having your own supply ensures that you\’re always ready to play. Two popular choices known for their solid bounce and durability are the Dura Pickleballs and Franklin Pickleballs.

Pickleball Backpacks

For players who need to transport their gear to the courts, a pickleball backpack is a convenient and practical accessory. The Gearbox Court Collection Pickleball Backpack is versatile, spacious, and comfortable, making it an excellent choice for carrying your pickleball essentials.

Grips

A reliable grip is crucial for maintaining control and confidence during gameplay. Overgrips and replacement grips can provide extra cushioning and improve grip for players who sweat a lot. Consider options like the Pickleskins Thin Sliced Overgrip or the Pickleskins Break and Butter Replacement Grips to enhance your paddle\’s grip.

Paddle Covers

Protecting your pickleball paddle from damage is essential for prolonging its lifespan and maintaining its performance. The Pickleskins Dill-fender Paddle Cover offers a lightweight and durable solution. With various colors available, this cover effectively prevents chips, scratches, and spills, ensuring your paddle stays in excellent condition.

Edge Guard Tape

Edge guard tape is a must-have accessory for preserving the edges of your pickleball paddle. The Pickleskins Paddle Edge Guard Tape is designed to fit all paddle thicknesses and provides both durability and style. Protect your paddle from everyday wear and tear with this essential accessory.

By investing in these must-have pickleball accessories, you can elevate your game, protect your equipment, and enjoy pickleball to the fullest.

Pickleball Accessories Description
Pickleballs Ensure you have a supply of high-quality pickleballs for gameplay.
Pickleball Backpacks Carry your gear to the courts with a spacious and comfortable pickleball backpack.
Grips Improve grip and control on your paddle with overgrips or replacement grips.
Paddle Covers Protect your paddle from damage with a lightweight and durable paddle cover.
Edge Guard Tape Preserve the edges of your paddle with edge guard tape, providing both style and durability.

Why Trust Us

The experts at Men\’s Health have personal experience and expertise in the game of pickleball. They understand the importance of having the right gear to enhance your performance on the court. That\’s why they have extensively tested and evaluated various pickleball gear, including paddles and balls, to provide trusted recommendations to players of all skill levels. Their firsthand experience ensures that their recommendations are based on real-world performance and quality.

Men\’s Health takes pride in delivering reliable and accurate information to readers. Their buying guides for pickleball gear, such as shoes and paddles, further showcase their knowledge and commitment to helping players make informed decisions. By providing detailed reviews and expert insights, Men\’s Health ensures that readers have access to trusted information that can help them elevate their pickleball game.

Whether you\’re a beginner just starting out or a seasoned player looking to upgrade your gear, you can trust the experts at Men\’s Health to provide recommendations that will meet your needs and help you perform at your best on the pickleball court.

What to Look for in a Pickleball Ball

When selecting a pickleball ball, there are several factors to consider. The material, firmness, holes, and molding process all play a role in a ball\’s performance. A firm, dent-resistant ball with evenly dispersed and clean-cut holes is ideal. The rotational or injection molding process can affect the ball\’s playability. Players should also consider the ball\’s weight, bounce, and compatibility with tournament regulations.

The material of the pickleball ball is an important consideration. Most balls are made from either plastic or composite materials. Plastic balls are durable and have a consistent bounce, while composite balls offer better performance and playability.

Firmness is another crucial factor. A firm ball provides better control and accuracy, allowing players to execute precise shots. On the other hand, a softer ball offers more forgiveness and is easier on the joints.

Holes in the ball are designed to reduce wind resistance and create a consistent flight path. Look for a ball with evenly dispersed and clean-cut holes to ensure smooth gameplay.

The molding process used to manufacture the ball can affect its performance. Rotational molding creates a more durable ball with consistent wall thickness, while injection molding produces a more precise and uniform ball.

Weight and bounce are also important considerations. Pickleball balls typically weigh between 0.78 to 0.92 ounces. Choose a weight that suits your playing style and preferences. Bounce refers to the ball\’s ability to rebound off the paddle and the court surface. A consistent and predictable bounce is essential for a fair and enjoyable game.

Lastly, when selecting a pickleball ball, make sure it complies with tournament regulations, especially if you plan on playing in competitive settings. Check the specific requirements for official tournament play to ensure your ball is allowed.

By considering these factors, you can choose a pickleball ball that suits your playing style and enhances your overall pickleball experience.

Paddle Performance Factors & Review Criteria

When it comes to selecting the perfect paddle for pickleball, there are several important factors to consider. Paddle selection is influenced by a variety of performance factors that can greatly impact your game. These factors include weight, length, power, control, spin, and feel.

The weight and length of a paddle are crucial considerations as they should be suitable for the player\’s preference and playing style. Some players prefer a lighter paddle for quick maneuverability, while others opt for a heavier paddle for added power and stability.

Power in a paddle can come from both the core and surface materials. Paddles with a denser core often provide more power, while those with a softer core offer greater control. The surface material also plays a role in power generation, with rougher surfaces typically producing more spin and power.

Control is influenced by the paddle\’s shape and grip. Paddles with a wider shape offer a larger sweet spot, enhancing control and precision. The grip of a paddle can also greatly impact control, as a comfortable and secure grip allows for better handling and maneuverability.

Spin potential is determined by the texture of the paddle\’s surface. Paddles with a rougher surface texture provide improved grip on the ball, allowing for enhanced spin shots. Smooth surfaces, on the other hand, provide a more predictable shot trajectory.

The player\’s skill level, play style, and personal preferences also play a significant role in paddle selection. A beginner player may benefit from a paddle with a larger sweet spot and more forgiveness, while a more advanced player might prioritize power and control.

Lastly, durability and affordability are additional considerations to keep in mind when choosing a paddle. High-quality paddles made from durable materials tend to last longer and withstand intense gameplay. Affordability is also important, as players should consider their budget when investing in a paddle.

By taking into account these various performance factors and review criteria, players can make an informed decision when selecting a pickleball paddle that suits their individual needs. Ultimately, finding the right paddle can significantly enhance your performance and enjoyment of the game.

Summary

The Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide provides expert picks for the best pickleball equipment. From balls to paddles and accessories, this comprehensive guide helps players make informed decisions to enhance their game.

By considering features such as ball color, bounce, and durability, players can find their perfect match. Paddles with suitable weight, grip, and performance characteristics cater to players of all skill levels and playing styles.

Investing in quality gear and accessories can greatly improve the overall pickleball experience.

Balls:

  • Best pickleball ball overall: Franklin Sports X-40 Pickleballs
  • Best ball for beginners: Wilson Tru 32 Ball – 2 Pack
  • Best ball for competitive play: Onix Dura Fast 40 Pickleballs
  • Best new ball: PCKL Optic Speed Pickleballs Outdoor 4 Pack
  • Best ball for indoor use: Jugs Sport Pickleballs, 12-Pack
  • Most durable ball: Onix Fuse G2 Pickleball Ball, 6-Pack
  • Best balls to buy in bulk: Wilson TRU 32 Ball – Case
  • Most underrated ball: Wilson Tru 32 Pro Ball – 2 Pack
  • Another great ball for indoor play: Onix Pure 3 Indoor Pickleball Balls
  • Best hybrid ball: Selkirk Sport SLK Hybrid Indoor & Outdoor Pickleball Ball

Paddles:

  • Best overall pickleball paddle: Head Radical Tour RAW
  • Best value pickleball paddle: Ektelon Inferno Paddles
  • Best control pickleball paddle: Selkirk LUXX Control Air Invikta
  • Best feel pickleball paddle: JOOLA Ben Johns Hyperion C2 16
  • Best power pickleball paddle: Selkirk Power Air Invikta
  • Best spin pickleball paddle: CRBN 3X Power Series 14

Must-Have Accessories:

  • Pickleballs: Dura Pickleballs, Franklin Pickleballs
  • Pickleball Backpacks: Gearbox Court Collection Pickleball Backpack
  • Grips: Pickleskins Thin Sliced Overgrip, Pickleskins Break and Butter Replacement Grips
  • Paddle Covers: Pickleskins Dill-fender Paddle Cover
  • Edge Guard Tape: Pickleskins Paddle Edge Guard Tape

Conclusion

The Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide: Expert\’s Top Picks for the Year provides a comprehensive overview of the best pickleball gear available. From high-quality balls to top-notch paddles and essential accessories, this guide offers the expert recommendations from the pickleball community. By considering the features and performance factors discussed in this guide, players can make informed decisions to elevate their game and maximize their enjoyment of this exciting sport.

Whether you are a beginner just starting out or a competitive player looking to upgrade your equipment, having the right gear is crucial. The Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide offers valuable insights and recommendations to help you find the perfect equipment that suits your needs and playing style.

With the guide\’s in-depth reviews and expert picks, you can be confident that you are investing in top-quality gear that will enhance your performance on the court. By choosing the best pickleball balls, paddles, and accessories, you can take your game to the next level and enjoy pickleball to the fullest.

Remember, the right equipment can make a significant difference in your enjoyment and success in pickleball. So, take advantage of the expert recommendations in The Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide and equip yourself with the gear that will help you play your best game!

FAQ

What are the expert\’s top picks for pickleball gear?

The expert\’s top picks for pickleball gear include the Franklin Sports X-40 Pickleballs, Wilson Tru 32 Ball – 2 Pack, Onix Dura Fast 40 Pickleballs, PCKL Optic Speed Pickleballs Outdoor 4 Pack, Jugs Sport Pickleballs, Onix Fuse G2 Pickleball Ball, Wilson TRU 32 Ball – Case, Wilson Tru 32 Pro Ball – 2 Pack, Onix Pure 3 Indoor Pickleball Balls, Selkirk Sport SLK Hybrid Indoor & Outdoor Pickleball ball, Head Radical Tour RAW, Ektelon Inferno Paddles, Selkirk LUXX Control Air Invikta, JOOLA Ben Johns Hyperion C2 16, Selkirk Power Air Invikta, CRBN 3X Power Series 14, Dura Pickleballs, Franklin Pickleballs, Gearbox Court Collection Pickleball Backpack, Pickleskins Thin Sliced Overgrip, Pickleskins Break and Butter Replacement Grips, Pickleskins Dill-fender Paddle Cover, and Pickleskins Paddle Edge Guard Tape.

Why should I trust the expert\’s recommendations for pickleball gear?

The experts at Men\’s Health have personal experience and expertise in the game of pickleball. They have extensively tested and evaluated various pickleball gear, including paddles and balls, to provide trusted recommendations. Their buying guides for pickleball gear, such as shoes and paddles, further showcase their knowledge and commitment to delivering reliable information to readers.

What should I look for in a pickleball ball?

When selecting a pickleball ball, there are several factors to consider. The material, firmness, holes, and molding process all play a role in a ball\’s performance. A firm, dent-resistant ball with evenly dispersed and clean-cut holes is ideal. The rotational or injection molding process can affect the ball\’s playability. Players should also consider the ball\’s weight, bounce, and compatibility with tournament regulations.

What are the performance factors and review criteria for pickleball paddles?

Paddle selection is influenced by factors such as weight, length, power, control, spin, and feel. The weight and length of a paddle should be suitable for the player\’s preference and playing style. Power can come from the core and surface materials, while control is influenced by the paddle\’s shape and grip. Spin potential is determined by the paddle\’s surface texture. The player\’s skill level, play style, and preferences also impact paddle selection. Durability and affordability are additional considerations.

What are the must-have pickleball accessories?

Must-have pickleball accessories include pickleballs (such as Dura Pickleballs and Franklin Pickleballs), pickleball backpacks (such as the Gearbox Court Collection Pickleball Backpack), grips (such as Pickleskins Thin Sliced Overgrip and Pickleskins Break and Butter Replacement Grips), paddle covers (such as the Pickleskins Dill-fender Paddle Cover), and edge guard tape (such as the Pickleskins Paddle Edge Guard Tape).

What is the summary of the Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide?

The Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide provides expert picks for the best pickleball equipment. From balls to paddles and accessories, this comprehensive guide helps players make informed decisions to enhance their game. By considering features such as ball color, bounce, and durability, players can find their perfect match. Paddles with suitable weight, grip, and performance characteristics cater to players of all skill levels and playing styles. Investing in quality gear and accessories can greatly improve the overall pickleball experience.

What is the conclusion of the Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide?

The Ultimate Pickleball Gear Guide: Expert\’s Top Picks for the Year offers a comprehensive overview of the best pickleball gear. From balls to paddles and accessories, this guide covers the top recommendations from experts in the pickleball community. By considering the features and performance factors discussed in this guide, players can make informed decisions and elevate their game. Whether you are a beginner or a competitive player, having the right equipment is crucial for enjoying the sport to the fullest.
